summary.title: Summary
summary.content: SocratexBusinessDev is the reusable work profile for business software work. It is the main 'how to do things' router for any professional codebase: a single WORKFLOW.json that classifies the task and then gives the rules to remember for that task type. Company-agnostic and language-agnostic. Communication style and legacy-specific stances come from a subprofile (default: foreign_legacy_code).

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.content: One source of truth for how the agent operates on business dev work, so the same task-type rules do not have to be re-derived per project or scattered across CLAUDE.md, workflow files, and agent memory. WORKFLOW.json is the router; the subprofile supplies communication style plus any codebase-reality extensions (e.g. foreign/legacy). Keep the work model source-owned here instead of forked per child project.

subprofiles.title: Subprofiles
subprofiles.content:
SocratexBusinessDev is the generic work model. A subprofile refines it with a communication style and codebase-reality-specific extensions. It does NOT replace the router; it extends it.

Available subprofiles (communication profile ids in core/communication-profiles/):

- foreign_legacy_code (DEFAULT): foreign / legacy business codebase where the agent does not own the domain, the code is messy, and the user is reviewer + tester. Adds: ask-over-guess bias, no-fabrication gap-flagging, unknown-unknown surfacing, plain non-technical explanation layer, business-storytelling reporting.

Resolution: the active communication profile is set by communication.profile in PIPELINE-CONFIG.json (falls back to the workspace default, then standard). When SocratexBusinessDev is active and no communication profile is set, use foreign_legacy_code.

default_memory_mode.title: Default Memory Mode
default_memory_mode.content: Default `workflow.memory_mode` for this profile is `task_scoped`. Business dev work is typically ticket-driven against a codebase the agent does not own, shipped and then forgotten, so durable knowledge (decisions, rationale, constraints, READ-FIRST gotchas) folds into the ticket STATE and no project-level `DECISIONS.json` or context capsules are used; there is no promotion. A project may override to `project_scoped` when it is genuinely owned and long-lived. Full contract: `project/code/MEMORY-MODE.json`.

child_override_policy.title: Child Override Policy
child_override_policy.content: Children may add project-specific docs, state, plans, context capsules, tools, configs, and explicit overrides. Updates must preserve locally changed managed profile files and report them as overrides instead of overwriting them silently.

project_stack.title: Project Stack
project_stack.content: Designed for professional business software of any language or framework: inherited monoliths, customizations of CRM/ERP/billing/business platforms, integration glue, business-rules engines, legacy framework projects, and greenfield modules inside a business product. No engine, gamedev, or simulation assumptions (use SocratexGamedev for those).
